items.title: Virtual Support Group
items.meta: Every Wednesday · 5:00–6:00 PM CST · Google Meet
items.description: Our Alzheimer's Association-certified support group — honest conversation and real connection in a judgment-free space. Register once; the link and reminders come to you.

items.title: Memory Social — Drop-In Respite
items.description: A welcoming, supervised gathering for your loved one — familiar activities, trained staff, no pressure — while you take a real break.

items.title: Wellness Grant Info Session
items.description: Everything about Wellness Grants: member eligibility, the application, how awards and care packages are personalized, and Q&A.

items.title: Memory Social Caregiver Event
items.description: Two rooms, one space: your loved one enjoys a supervised Memory Social while you join fellow caregivers for wellness, connection, and education.
